name: superui
description: Agent-agnostic frontend UI workflow skills: design analysis, DESIGN.md, planning, TDD implementation, responsive QA, accessibility, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend UI design, planning, implementation, and review
interface.longDescription: Use SuperUI to guide frontend UI work through source analysis, DESIGN.md generation, implementation planning, TDD, responsive and accessibility checks, and review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use SuperUI to design and implement a frontend UI.
Use SuperUI to analyze this project and generate a DESIGN.md.
